proposition: FaMe trade s.r.o. (IČO 29292859, founded 2011) is ACTIVE, and Václav Faraga currently holds 50 % (since 14 Dec 2020) and remains a jednatel, alongside Tomáš Melichárek (50 %, jednatel). Petr Faraga was a jednatel and shareholder until December 2020. Melichárek's 50 % record shows the same Jan–Apr 2026 re-registration churn as his other holdings.
shortTitle: FaMe trade s.r.o. (IČO 29292859, founded 2011) is ACTIVE, and…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: CORRECTION of the earlier mirror-based record, which stated the company was dissolved/exited and that both Václav and Petr Faraga had left by end-2020 — the primary register contradicts that for Václav Faraga, who took 50 % at exactly that date.

sources.title: ARES — official REST API, basic + full public-register (VR) records for all 19 in-scope entities, preserved and hashed
